title: Crisp Middle Eastern Phyllo Dough Samosas
description: A snappy and energizing Middle Eastern dish featuring phyllo dough, perfect as a low-glycemic-friendly snack, with a bitter and refreshing taste. This recipe combines the crunch of phyllo dough with the zest of Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped spinach, crumbled feta cheese, chopped parsley, chopped green onions, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and sumac.
Lay a sheet of phyllo dough on a flat surface and brush with olive oil.
Place a tablespoon of the spinach mixture in the center of the phyllo dough.
Fold the phyllo dough into a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Repeat the process with the remaining phyllo dough and spinach mixture.
Place the samosas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with olive oil.
Bake the samosas for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the samosas from the oven and immediately submerge them in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Serve the samosas warm or at room temperature.
